case_title: MARVIN BERMUDEZ VS. YAO PING CHU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $788.00 FILED BY BERMUDEZ, MARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, YAO PING DBA  NEW GENERATION ACUPUNCTURE HEALTH CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-02-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, YAO PING DBA  NEW GENERATION ACUPUNCTURE HEALTH CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH MA--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHU, YAO PING DBA  NEW GENERATION ACUPUNCTURE HEALTH CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERMUDEZ, MARVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHU, YAO PING DBA  NEW GENERATION ACUPUNCTURE HEALTH CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
